sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Direxion Daily Semiconductor Bull 3x Shares ETF Options Spot-On: On March 31st, 248.9K Contracts Were Traded, With 1.06 Million Open Interest
feed.summary: On March 31st, the Direxion Daily Semiconductor Bull 3x Shares ETF (SOXL.US) saw significant options trading activity, with a total volume of 248.9K contracts. Call options slightly outnumbered put options. The open interest for SOXL reached approximately 1.06 million contracts, which represents a 103.61% increase compared to the average of the past 30 trading days.

feed.title: [ARS] SOUTH PLAINS FINANCIAL, INC. SEC Filing
feed.summary: This article announces an ARS SEC filing by South Plains Financial, Inc. (SPFI) on March 31, 2026, which is available as a PDF document. It also provides an overview of the company's recent news, SEC filings, and stock data including market cap, float, industry, and location. South Plains Financial is ranked #3121 by market cap and has recently announced a merger, community impact report, stock repurchase program, and its recognition as one of America's Best Banks by Forbes.

feed.title: Silicon Valley Acquisition (NASDAQ: SVAQ) details $221.6M SPAC trust and 2027 deal deadline
feed.summary: Silicon Valley Acquisition Corp. (SVAQ) has filed its annual report (10-K), detailing a trust account balance of $221.55 million intended for an initial business combination. The SPAC completed its IPO, raising $215 million, and has until December 24, 2027, to finalize a deal, after which public shareholders can redeem their shares. The report outlines the company's acquisition criteria, financial position, and risks associated with SPAC operations, including competition and regulatory changes.

feed.title: Silicon Valley Acquisition 10-K: Net loss $0.343M, Trust cash $200.119M, EPS impact
feed.summary: Silicon Valley Acquisition (SVAQ) reported a net loss of $0.343 million for the period of July 21-December 31, 2025, due to non-operating structure costs and the absence of operating revenues. The company generated $0.119 million in interest income from its trust account, which holds $200.119 million designated for a business combination. SVAQ's activities have focused on its IPO, corporate formation, and preparing for a target acquisition.

feed.title: [Form 4] Suzano S.A. Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: This article reports on an insider trading activity at Suzano S.A. (SUZ) based on a Form 4 filing. Maria Luiza de Oliveira Pinto, VP of Sustainability, Communication & Brand, received a grant of 8,706 cash-settled phantom shares on March 30, 2026, which vest on March 1, 2029. These phantom shares track the price of Suzano common shares and will be settled in cash upon vesting.

feed.title: ETFs Investing in Sasol Limited Sponsored ADR Stocks
feed.summary: This article lists several ETFs that invest in Sasol Limited Sponsored ADR stocks, providing details such as market value, weight, issuer, expense ratio, AUM, price, and performance. These ETFs aim to make investing in such stocks more accessible and offer diversified opportunities with lower risk. The listed funds include Avantis Emerging Markets Equity ETF, Amplify International Enhanced Dividend Income ETF, BNP Paribas Easy MSCI Emerging Min TE, Avantis Emerging Markets Value ETF, ActivePassive International Equity ETF, VanEck Africa Index ETF, Avantis Emerging Markets ex-China Equity ETF, and National Security Emerging Markets Index ETF.

feed.title: Seritage Growth Properties 10-K: Rental Income $17.6M, Net Cash Used in Ops $(34.9)M
feed.summary: Seritage Growth Properties reported rental income of $17.597 million and a net gain on sale of real estate of $20.342 million for the year, reflecting ongoing asset monetization. Despite these gains, the company experienced constrained operating cash flows, with net cash used in operating activities at $(34.903) million. Management continues to rebalance the portfolio through accelerated sales and strategic reassessment of development plans.

feed.title: Stereotaxis, Inc. expands remote robotic testing with TeleRobotic Test Drive launch
feed.summary: Stereotaxis, Inc. has introduced its TeleRobotic Test Drive, enabling remote access to its RoboticEP technology for prospective clients and partners. This initiative aims to increase accessibility and adoption of robotic electrophysiology solutions. The company previously announced plans to unveil new robotic EP technology at upcoming events like EHRA2026, highlighting its focus on innovation in remote and robotic EP.

feed.title: XS332063910 Latest News and Headlines
feed.summary: This page provides the latest news and headlines for the corporate bond XS332063910, issued by Sumitomo Mitsui Financial Group, Inc. and listed on the Frankfurt Stock Exchange. It includes basic bond information such as its interest rate and maturity date, but currently shows no specific news articles beyond general market data and provider acknowledgements.

feed.title: [ARS] SITE Centers Corp. SEC Filing
feed.summary: This article announces an SEC filing by SITE Centers Corp. (SITC) of form type ARS. The filing, categorized with low impact and neutral sentiment, was accepted on March 31, 2026, and provides details about the company's annual report to shareholders. It also lists recent news and other SEC filings for SITE Centers Corp.

feed.title: Sportsman's Warehouse 10-K: $1.21B Revenue, $(1.30) EPS
feed.summary: Sportsman's Warehouse reported fiscal year net sales of $1.21 billion and a net loss per share of $(1.30), a 1.0% revenue increase with a net loss of $(50.1) million. The company's profitability was impacted by a $17.8 million impairment charge. Strategic priorities include technology investments, inventory discipline, and pausing new store openings to restore profitability.

feed.title: SmartFinancial Elevates Cynthia Cain to Chief Operating Officer
feed.summary: SmartFinancial (SMBK) has promoted Cynthia Cain to Chief Operating Officer, a newly formalized role aimed at consolidating operational and technology functions to drive growth and innovation. Cain, formerly the Chief Accounting Officer, will oversee various departments including Operations, Technology, Data, and AI Governance. This move emphasizes SmartBank's commitment to strategic growth and operational excellence, reflecting a focus on leveraging internal talent and adapting to industry changes in the financial services sector.

feed.title: SOBR Safe schedules 2026 annual meeting for May 18, sets proposal deadlines
feed.summary: SOBR Safe, Inc. announced its 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders will be held on May 18, 2026, with stock record holders as of April 10, 2026, eligible to vote. Shareholders wishing to submit proposals for the proxy statement must do so by April 9, 2026, and those soliciting proxies for director nominees by April 10, 2026. This announcement comes as the company's shares trade near their 52-week low, and follows recent extensions of executive employment agreements and the appointment of a new transfer agent.

feed.title: SOBR Safe (NASDAQ: SOBR) schedules 2026 annual meeting and proposal deadlines
feed.summary: SOBR Safe, Inc. has announced that its 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders will be held on Monday, May 18, 2026. Stockholders record as of April 10, 2026, will be eligible to vote. The deadline for submitting proposals to be included in the proxy statement is April 9, 2026, and the deadline for director nominee notices under universal proxy rules is April 10, 2026.

feed.title: SOR Financials: Revenue Breakdown, Margins & Competitor Comparison
feed.summary: This article provides a financial overview of Source Capital Inc. (SOR), detailing its revenue breakdown, profitability margins, and a framework for competitor comparison. It highlights SOR's strong gross, operating, and net margins, indicating effective financial management.

feed.title: Soluna Holdings, Inc. 9.0% Series A Cumulative Perpetual Trade Ideas — NASDAQ:SLNHP
feed.summary: This article compiles several trade ideas and analyses for Soluna Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ:SLNHP) and its common stock (NASDAQ:SLNH), highlighting bullish perspectives due to technical patterns and company developments. Analysts predict significant price increases, driven by Soluna's green data center initiatives for Bitcoin mining and AI, alongside recent project expansions and partnerships. The various analyses discuss potential price targets ranging from $1.71 to over $2,500 based on different technical indicators and fundamental growth drivers.

feed.title: SMBC Should I Buy
feed.summary: The article provides an analysis of Southern Missouri Bancorp Inc (SMBC), recommending it as a good buy for long-term beginner investors. It highlights strong Q2 2026 financial performance, positive technical indicators, and recent upward revisions in analyst price targets. Despite a lack of significant news or strong trading sentiment from hedge funds and insiders, the company's fundamentals support a long-term investment strategy.

feed.title: Raymond James raises TD Synnex stock price target on strong earnings
feed.summary: Raymond James has increased its price target for TD Synnex (NYSE:SNX) to $200 from $175, maintaining a Strong Buy rating, following the company's robust first-quarter fiscal 2026 results. The firm highlighted significant growth in revenue and profitability, with EPS increasing by almost 70% and the Hyve division operating at a $10 billion annualized run rate. Despite strong financial performance and exceeding analyst expectations, the company's stock experienced a pre-market decline.

feed.title: Snail Received Notice of Noncompliance
feed.summary: Snail (SNAL) has received a Nasdaq deficiency letter on March 26, 2026, due to noncompliance with the net income requirement and failure to meet alternative standards for market value or stockholders' equity. The company has 45 days, until May 11, 2026, to submit a compliance plan and might receive a 180-day extension if it's accepted. Snail's Class A common stock will continue to trade on The Nasdaq Capital Market without immediate effect.

feed.title: Sotera Health Company (NASDAQ:SHC) Short Interest Up 19.4% in March
feed.summary: Sotera Health Company (NASDAQ:SHC) experienced a significant increase in short interest in March, rising 19.4% to over 10.5 million shares, representing 8.3% of the stock. Despite a director's sale of 10 million shares, insiders still own 55.12% and institutional investors hold 91.03% of the company. Sotera Health also beat quarterly earnings estimates and issued positive FY2026 guidance, with analysts setting a consensus target price of $20.43.

feed.title: Smith-Midland pushes back annual report as audit work continues
feed.summary: Smith-Midland Corporation filed a Form 12b-25 to announce a delay in filing its 2025 Annual Report on Form 10-K, now expected by April 15, 2026. The delay is due to the need for additional time to complete financial reporting processes, including an internal control assessment and audit procedures. Despite the delay, the company reiterated strong preliminary financial guidance for 2025, expecting significant revenue growth and record annual net income.

feed.title: SFBC (SFBC) CEO’s charitable trust sells 900 shares in 10b5-1 trade
feed.summary: Sound Financial Bancorp, Inc. (SFBC) President and CEO Laura Lee Stewart's charitable trust sold 900 shares of common stock at $44.13 per share on March 31, 2026, as part of a pre-set Rule 10b5-1(c) trading plan. After the transaction, the trust holds 9,900 shares, while Stewart directly owns 49,602 shares and has indirect holdings through an ESOP and 401(k), along with various stock options. The sale was executed by the trustee of the Stewart Charitable Remainder Trust, established for estate planning purposes.

feed.title: Sky Quarry 10-K: Revenue $12.49M, EPS (4.41)
feed.summary: Sky Quarry reported significantly reduced fiscal 2025 net sales of $12.49 million, down 47% year-over-year, and a net loss of $(12.20) million, or $(4.41) per share. This decline was primarily attributed to lower volumes and weaker WTI-linked product prices, resulting in a gross loss of $(3.10) million. The company is pursuing increased crude purchases and capital programs to recover volumes and support future operations.

feed.title: Great Point Partners, Dr. Jay & Nordahl disclose 8.45% stake in Sol-Gel (SLGL)
feed.summary: Great Point Partners, LLC, Dr. Jeffrey R. Jay, and Ms. Lillian Nordahl have disclosed an 8.45% beneficial ownership stake in Sol-Gel Technologies Ltd. (SLGL). This stake, totaling 274,363 ordinary shares, is reported in a Schedule 13G filing. The percentage is based on 3,245,270 shares outstanding as of March 24, 2026, and the reporting persons share voting and dispositive power over these shares, which are held by funds managed by Great Point.

feed.title: Aptiv holders get 1 Versigent share for every 3 as spin-off begins
feed.summary: Versigent PLC has officially spun off from Aptiv PLC, establishing itself as an independent, publicly traded company on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker "VGNT". Aptiv shareholders received one ordinary share of Versigent for every three shares of Aptiv common stock held, with the transaction completed as a tax-free spin-off for both Swiss and U.S. federal income tax purposes. Versigent launches with 2025 revenues of $8.8 billion and adjusted EBITDA of $893 million, positioning itself as a global leader in electrical architectures with a focus on future growth and shareholder returns.

feed.title: Does Safe Harbor’s Exclusive Marine Deal Deepen Chubb’s Niche Strategy Or Narrow Its Opportunities (CB)?
feed.summary: Chubb has entered an exclusive partnership with Safe Harbor Marinas, making it the preferred insurance provider for over 150 marinas, focusing on high-end recreational marine insurance. While this deal reinforces Chubb's strategy of targeting niche, specialized insurance segments, it is unlikely to significantly alter the company's near-term earnings or overshadow key risks like competition and catastrophe exposure. Investors are advised to look at Chubb's upcoming Q1 2026 earnings release for a clearer picture of its overall underwriting trends and investment narrative.

feed.title: Sun Life acquires remaining BGO stake for over $1B
feed.summary: Sun Life Financial Services has acquired the remaining 44% stake in Miami Beach-based BGO for $1.2 billion, bringing its total ownership to 100%. This acquisition is part of a larger strategy to merge BGO with Bell Partners, a multifamily investment firm, for an additional $350 million, anticipating significant growth in the multifamily sector. Sun Life's total spend on these transactions amounts to at least $1.6 billion, including a separate acquisition of the remaining stake in Crescent Capital Group.

feed.title: Rhythm Pharmaceuticals’ Stock Jumps After New Drug Approval
feed.summary: Rhythm Pharmaceuticals Inc. (NASDAQ: RYTM) saw its stock jump over 10% following the FDA's expanded approval of its obesity treatment, Imcivree, for patients aged four and above with acquired hypothalamic obesity. This regulatory success has bolstered investor confidence, positioning the company for significant growth and diversification despite some financial challenges. Analysts maintain a positive outlook, anticipating further market expansion, particularly with strategic moves into Europe.

feed.title: SES AI Corp (NYSE: SES) RSU vesting triggers 60,452-share tax withholding
feed.summary: SES AI Corp's Chief Legal Officer, Kyle Pilkington, had 60,452 shares of Class A Common Stock withheld for tax obligations related to vesting restricted stock units (RSUs). This transaction, valued at $0.9873 per share, was a routine tax withholding and not a market sale. After this, Pilkington directly holds 719,751 Class A shares, including 435,453 shares still subject to forfeiture until they vest.

feed.title: Skye Bioscience, Inc. advances nimacimab dosing to target CB1 pathway
feed.summary: Skye Bioscience, Inc. is progressing with the development of nimacimab, aiming to optimize its dosing and exposure to maximize therapeutic potential, especially for targeting CB1 pathways. Early results from its CBeyond study, where nimacimab was combined with semaglutide, suggest that higher exposure levels might be necessary to engage peripheral CB1 targets more effectively. The company is evaluating nimacimab's clinical prospects and will report its Q4 and full-year 2025 financial results on March 10, 2026.

feed.title: SFL (NYSE: SFL) director discloses option grants and indirect shares
feed.summary: SFL Corp Ltd. director Homan-Russell George William has disclosed his initial holdings, which include share options for a significant number of common shares with various exercise prices and expiration dates. He also indirectly owns 8,750 common shares through WHR Capital Ltd., a company he wholly owns. The disclosed information represents his beneficial ownership rather than recent market transactions.

feed.title: SiriusXM to Report First Quarter 2026 Operating and Financial Results
feed.summary: SiriusXM (NASDAQ: SIRI) is scheduled to release its first quarter 2026 operating and financial results on Thursday, April 30, 2026. The company will also host an investor conference call at 8:00 a.m. ET on the same day. Investors can access a live webcast of the call on the SiriusXM Investor Relations website or join by telephone.

feed.title: Seven Hills Realty Trust First Quarter 2026 Conference Call Scheduled for Wednesday, April 29th
feed.summary: Seven Hills Realty Trust (SEVN) announced its first quarter 2026 financial results will be released after the Nasdaq closes on Tuesday, April 28, 2026. A conference call to discuss these results will be held on Wednesday, April 29, 2026, at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time, featuring President and Chief Investment Officer Tom Lorenzini, Chief Financial Officer Matthew Brown, and Vice President Jared Lewis. A replay and webcast of the call will also be available for those unable to attend live.

The analysis suggests that SDRL's premium over the industry average P/S ratio appears sustainable due to robust revenue growth.

Key news includes U.S. Global Investors' dividend continuity, ETF listings in various markets, and discussions around gold and silver's role in the current economic climate. The page also highlights GOAU's status as a gold mining ETF and its stock price data.

feed.title: Prelim 2025 results show SDOT revenue $247M; 10-K filing delayed (SDOT)
feed.summary: Sadot Group Inc. (SDOT) announced a delay in filing its 2025 Annual Report on Form 10-K, citing the need for additional time to compile and review disclosures. The company provided preliminary, unaudited 2025 financial estimates, indicating a significant revenue decline to $247 million from $701 million in 2024, and an operating loss of $14.0 million compared to an operating income of $6.2 million in the previous year. This decline is attributed primarily to insufficient working capital and delays in collecting receivables from its LATAM division, with management actively pursuing additional financing and reviewing strategic alternatives.

feed.title: Rayonier keeping its name after merger with PotlatchDeltic
feed.summary: Rayonier Inc. announced it will retain its name following its merger with PotlatchDeltic Corp., despite earlier plans to adopt a new name. The decision was made after considering both companies' rich history, brand equity, and market presence, concluding that keeping the Rayonier name, along with a refreshed logo, would best serve the combined entity. Rayonier CEO Mark McHugh stated this approach honors their history, leverages strong brand equity, and mitigates costs and confusion.

feed.title: Riverview shareholders get $0.02 a share cash dividend April 24
feed.summary: Riverview Bancorp (Nasdaq GSM: RVSB) announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.02 per share, consistent with the previous quarter. The dividend was approved on March 26, 2026, and is payable on April 24, 2026, to shareholders of record as of April 13, 2026. As of December 31, 2025, Riverview reported $1.51 billion in assets and operates 17 branches.

feed.title: Sea Limited's Billion-Dollar Buyback Provides a Foundation Amid Consolidation
feed.summary: Sea Limited is in a consolidation phase following a period of significant share price weakness, with its stock trading near 52-week lows. A key component of investor confidence is a $1 billion share repurchase program. The company is also focusing on strategic AI integration to streamline operations and expanding its SeaMoney fintech division beyond the Shopee ecosystem to diversify revenue.

feed.title: Rising costs deepen 374Water (NASDAQ: SCWO) 2025 net loss and cash drain
feed.summary: 374Water (NASDAQ: SCWO) reported a significant widening of its net loss to $21.0 million in 2025 from $12.4 million the prior year, primarily due to a 58% increase in operating expenses to $18.8 million. The company's cash and cash equivalents also saw a sharp decline from $10.7 million to $3.2 million, highlighting a weakened liquidity position despite some commercial traction in PFAS destruction. Management plans to focus on disciplined capital allocation, scaling its AirSCWO platform, and building an Orlando waste destruction hub to address these financial challenges and drive future growth.

feed.title: Rezolute (RZLT) CFO adds 10,000 shares in open-market purchase
feed.summary: Rezolute, Inc.'s CFO, Daron Evans, purchased 10,000 common shares in an open-market transaction at $2.85 per share on March 30, 2026. This purchase brings his direct holdings to 414,462 common shares. The filing also details various indirect holdings through his spouse, minor children, and PoC Capital, LLC, for which he disclaims beneficial ownership except for his pecuniary interest.

feed.title: Invesco Exchange-Traded Fund Trust - Invesco S&P 500 Equal Weight Technology ETF announces Quarterly dividend, payable on March 27, 2026
feed.summary: Invesco Exchange-Traded Fund Trust - Invesco S&P 500 Equal Weight Technology ETF (RYT) has announced a quarterly dividend of $0.0393 per share. This dividend is payable on March 27, 2026, with the ex-date and record date both set for March 23, 2026. The announcement was made on January 2, 2026, according to S&P Capital IQ.

feed.title: Insider sale: Satellogic (SATL) president trims stake by 9,499 shares
feed.summary: Satellogic President Matthew Tirman sold 9,499 shares of Class A Common Stock for $5.179 per share on March 30, 2026, totaling approximately $49,195. Following the transaction, Tirman still directly holds 154,184 shares, maintaining a substantial investment in the company. This open-market sale was reported via a Form 4 SEC filing and is deemed to have a neutral impact but negative sentiment for the company.

feed.title: SAJ SEC Filings - Saratoga Invtmt 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K Forms
